prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年江西省理科/物理类最低位次分别为约5873名→6662名→6283名→10181名→13605名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近两年累计后移约7322名；2025年基准位次约13605名，较2024年后移约3424名，后移幅度较大；该校在江西省招生计划2021–2025年每年均为4人，2026年招生计划仍为4人，与2025年持平，无扩招缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名2026年第65名，近年排名稳定在60–70区间，属中上水平211院校；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及拟录取研究生因不当言论被取消资格事件；抖音热度排名第57位（较热），关注度中等；未见投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评A-，共5个A-及以上学科，工科实力均衡。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 招生专业中数字媒体技术属计算机大类（热度偏热但近年明显降温），建筑学属土木建筑大类（分化观望、劝退为主）；江西省2026年物理类考生约26.6万人，与2025年基本持平；北京工业大学位于北京市，非本省高校；该校在江西省招生占比极小（2025年仅20人，占全校招生3.34%），属典型跨省招生，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、考生规模稳定及声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年竞争略加剧但后移幅度收窄；在2025年基准13605名基础上小幅上移，预测最低位次约13805名，区间13305–14305名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数字媒体技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 建筑学（五年）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（13305–14305名）内，建议以数字媒体技术为主攻方向（一档冲刺），建筑学作为保底选择（三档）；位次明显优于区间上限（<13305名）可重点冲刺数字媒体技术；位次接近区间下限（>14305名）则建筑学录取概率较大。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Jiangxi Province Science/Physics Category were approximately 5873 → 6662 → 6283 → 10181 → 13605, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7322 in the last two years; the 2025 baseline ranking is about 13605, a backward shift of about 3424 from 2024, indicating a significant backward movement; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province was 4 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 enrollment plan remains 4 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion to alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking 65th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, stable in the 60–70 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving an incident where a proposed graduate student was disqualified due to inappropriate remarks; Douyin popularity ranking is 57th (relatively hot), with moderate attention; no records of file-throwing gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering received an A rating, Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering received A- ratings, with a total of 5 A- and above disciplines, indicating balanced engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the enrollment majors, Digital Media Technology belongs to the computer category (popular but significantly cooling in recent years), Architecture belongs to the civil engineering category (differentiated and cautious, mainly discouraged); in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangxi Province is about 266,000, basically unchanged from 2025; Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, not a local university; the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is very small (only 20 students in 2025, accounting for 3.34% of the total enrollment), typical cross-province enrollment, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, stable examinee numbers, and slightly negative reputation, competition is expected to slightly intensify but the backward shift will narrow; based on the 2025 baseline of 13605, a slight upward adjustment is predicted, with the minimum ranking approximately 13805, range 13305–14305.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Digital Media Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Architecture (Five Years).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (13305–14305), it is recommended to focus on Digital Media Technology as the main direction (Tier 1 sprint), with Architecture as a safety choice (Tier 3); if your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<13305), you can focus on sprinting for Digital Media Technology; if your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>14305), the probability of admission to Architecture is higher.
